generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow concerned citizen, I've been following the strategic autonomy debates closely. It's troubling how some politicians frame this as just about 'going it alone.' The reality is, we're talking about protecting our families and communities from emerging threats while maintaining our values. Look at how our allies have strengthened their preparedness - it's not about isolation, it's about responsible partnership. We can't afford to be caught off guard again. #NationalSecurity #CommunityFirst
